basics.name: Zhang Jingxuan
basics.summary: M.Sc. student in AI for Science (Physics) at the National University of Singapore; B.Eng. in Software Engineering at Beihang University.

work.summary: Multimodal nutrition model evaluation and dataset construction.
highlights: Developed data annotation tools and built Q&A datasets using multimodal large models.
Assisted testing and tuning of a multimodal nutrition model; submitted NutriVLM to ICASSP 2025 as first author.

publications.name: From Environmental Perception to Intelligent Battery Management: A Novel Real-Time Fault Early Warning Method for Onboard Power Batteries in a Cyber-Physical System
publications.summary: Real-time fault early warning for onboard power batteries in a cyber-physical system.

publications.name: NutrientHub Multimodal Nutrition Analysis Q&A Platform
publications.publisher: China National Copyright Administration (Software Copyright Registration)

publications.name: Digital Twin Manufacturing Technology for Intelligent Connected Vehicle Accident Data Recording
publications.summary: Digital twin architecture and system for intelligent connected vehicle accident data recording.

teaching.description: Assisted training on AI applications (image/speech recognition); maintained lab environments and supported learners.

teaching.course: National Youth University Science Camp (Beihang Sub-camp)
teaching.description: Led participants in academic activities and innovation practices; documented activities for official channels.

portfolio.name: Understanding Criticality and Emergent Complexity via Graph Neural Networks (GNNs)
portfolio.description: Pipeline from micro-level rules (e.g., ECA) to graph datasets; interpretable GNNs for phase-boundary prediction.

portfolio.name: Technical Learning & Job Recruitment System (Zhonghang HR)
portfolio.description: Vue.js frontend, Django APIs, MySQL on cloud servers; LLM-based personalized career analysis and recommendation.

portfolio.name: Pick your Exclusive 2121 Image (WeChat mini-program)
portfolio.description: WeChat mini-program for creating and sharing personalized profile photos; Canvas-based real-time editing.

portfolio.name: Digital Twin ADR System for Intelligent Connected Vehicles
portfolio.description: Digital twin architecture and Django/Vue.js implementation for accident data recording, storage, and analysis.
